---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
African Bioinformatics Institute Interim Training Working Group
:::

# Training coordinated by the *African Bioinformatics Insitute*.

This site is hosted by the Interim ABI Training Working Group. It hosts course and training materials 
<br>

[African Bioinformatics Institute Homepage](https://www.bioinformaticsinstitute.africa){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}
[About the ABI](https://www.bioinformaticsinstitute.africa/about-organization){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::


## Training Events:

[ABI Bioinformatics Summer School Uganda 2026](https://interim-training-working-group-abi.github.io/ABI-Training/abisumschool26.html)

::: {.callout-tip}
Bioinformatics is the art of answering biological questions with computational tools. Practice your skills well and leave no question unexplored. 
:::
